# "Threadscar" Melissa

## Material Reality

Melissa eats the ordinary canal-heartland working-household diet (EVERYDAY_LIFE.md (a) food) — river fish, oats, rye bread, greens, mutton on feast days, soft cheese, dried fruit in winter — with the specific contractor-veteran overlay that she does not drink on contract and eats on rotation even when she is not hungry, because not eating is a variable she will not accept into a tactical problem. As human she is omnivorous and baseline per PEOPLES §Humans; she eats what Mudbrook has and does not fuss about it. The sugar-bun from Mudbrook she keeps in her field-kit is the exception, deliberate: she does not eat it unless she survives the contract. She knows it is a superstition. She keeps it anyway.

She sleeps in a row-cottage she rents in Mudbrook (EVERYDAY_LIFE.md (a) housing — three-storey canal-side row-cottage; workshop floor converted to gear-room and drill space; family floor her living quarters; loft her sleeping). On contract she sleeps in caravanserai bunks (ECONOMY_AND_RESOURCES.md drylands caravan rotation), fortified coaching-inns on wildland stretches between canal towns (CF-0034 wildland-road fortified-inn register per EVERYDAY_LIFE.md (a) housing extension), siege-camp tents, noble-estate tenant-cottage guest space, and where weather demands and route allows, in the open under oilcloth. She has slept well in all of them by training, not by preference.

What injures her most often is not the combat she trains against — that accounts for the scars — but the accumulated damage of being a long-careered contractor through all the job categories CF-0024 names: cuts, bites, claw punctures, puncture wounds from polearms in shield-lines, frostbite on cold-north caravan escort, sun-sickness on drylands rotation, joint-wear from decades of armored work, post-battle sepsis the contractor-empirical triage register catches before it kills her (CF-0024 contractor-specific empirical medicine; EVERYDAY_LIFE.md (a) Medicine extension). Her scars are numerous, visible, and named — the ones that gave her the "Threadscar" nickname fifteen years ago are across her torso and arms from a confined-space incident that was merely necessary, which is a distinction that matters to her. She has not taken contamination-injury in the CF-0025 chronic-exposure sense — she is not an occult-fallout specialist — but she has had enough extraction-escort rotations that a careful herb-wife would look twice at the darkened patch on her right shoulder.

Her possessions are ranked by function and maintained daily. Her longsword is first — the weapon that has kept her alive longest, oiled and sharpened at dawn before anything else on her rota (INSTITUTIONS.md §Military material-base; CF-0020 + CF-0024 standard-arms). A shorter blade at her belt for grapple-range; a serviceable bow she is competent-not-exceptional with (she knows raptor-folk archers outrange her and does not pretend otherwise — PEOPLES Cluster B raptor-folk archery). Armor appropriate to the contract: brigandine or reinforced leather on caravan work, heavier arrangements for siege; all of it fitted to her human frame by Bertram the Muddy, whose work she trusts (her long professional contact with him, per brief). A field-medicine kit more thorough than Vespera's patchwork — deep-cut suturing, tourniquet, cauterizing kit, wound-packing, burn-salve, basic empirical anti-sepsis compounds, bandaging in reserve (CF-0024 contractor-triage; EVERYDAY_LIFE.md (a) Medicine). Oilcloth pack, heavy boots she laces twice on the left because the last time she failed to do so someone died who did not need to. Coin-pouch running to silver where she can keep it — her hazard-pay tier (CF-0024 + ECONOMY_AND_RESOURCES.md wage-table posted-contract adventurer row, upper silver) affords this most seasons. A cheap sugar-bun from Mudbrook in a sealed oilcloth pocket. Boot-laces, spare; fire-kit; a ledger-book she uses only for contract accounting.

She cannot legally access the chartered artifact work itself — extraction, ward inscription, ceramic-vessel containment, neutralization remain guild-chartered (CF-0006, CF-0008, and CF-0024's guild-charter ceiling clause). She cannot purchase containment-grade ceramic clay (guild-monopolized per CF-0006 + ECONOMY_AND_RESOURCES.md specialist-resources). She cannot lawfully carry a grimoire fragment (CF-0023) in most polities and does not want to; she has no use for one. She cannot enlist in a canal-corridor quarantine dragoon corps (CF-0033) because she is not ward-resident-citizen in any adopting polity — the relevant polities around Mudbrook, in the current state of the frontmatter's deferred place-naming, may or may not be adopting, but her itinerant work profile does not fit ward-resident rolls regardless. She cannot be a contractor-auxiliary on Maker-Age expedition work (CF-0028) without patron-vetting and she has not pursued those rosters — her "bread and butter" per the brief is conventional hazard work, and she has not chased the retire-or-die expedition-share register.

Her mobility is the conventional heartland contractor circuit: canal-and-barge along the heartland mainline with horse or foot into wildland stretches between canal towns for caravan escort (CF-0034 + GEOGRAPHY.md trade corridors); occasional drylands rotation on caravanserai contracts; rarely into highland or fenland work (not her preferred range, and she declines fen contracts because she does not work well in water and knows it — EVERYDAY_LIFE.md (e) fen-village context; CF-0024 fenland relay-summoning variant). The medieval-to-early-modern chronotope (WORLD_KERNEL.md) means she travels slowly when it matters: contract travel is calculated, not romantic; she does not waste time, she does not rush.

She owes nothing standing. She runs cash-positive most seasons; she has honored every contract she has ever signed, which is the only economic asset CF-0024 actually rewards at her tier. What she owes in the grief-and-obligation register is quieter: an old grieving mother in a town she no longer visits; a half-finished teaching arrangement with Rill that did not ask for commitment but produced it; the bun-in-the-pocket ritual she cannot call a debt but will not discard.

Her human body gives her no species-specific advantage over any Cluster A contractor she routinely works with (PEOPLES Cluster A notes — cat-folk low-light vision, canid-folk scent-tracking, hare-folk hearing all outrange her in their registers). It also gives her no species-specific vulnerability beyond baseline. She has weathered winter-fever cycles (CF-0014) without dying, which as PEOPLES §Humans notes is not the same as being immune. The heartland's mild summers and moderate winters suit her frame; drylands rotations are tolerable; she does not take highland cold-pass contracts in deep winter anymore, which is a recent concession she does not like noticing in herself.

## Institutional Embedding

**Family / clan / household** (INSTITUTIONS.md §Family; EVERYDAY_LIFE.md (a) kinship): none current, none acknowledged. No spouse, no child, no adopted kin, no fostered dependent, no named heir. The brief specifies she "lives alone, doesn't date, never married." Her origin household is not named and is not narratively active; she does not return to it, does not discuss it, and has no inheritance path. She is — in the civic-registry sense — a household of one, which the canal-heartland texture recognizes as ordinary for itinerant contractor-veterans (CF-0024 + widow-of-the-job stratum texture, EVERYDAY_LIFE.md (a) oral-storytelling extension: "widow-of-the-job is a recognized household category").

**Law / custom / judgment** (INSTITUTIONS.md §Law + SOC-3 + CAU-3): she is civic-registry-visible as a hired veteran in her Mudbrook rental and across her contractor circuit. She honors coin-contract (SOC-3) absolutely — her top-tier contractor reputation is built on it and would not survive a breach. She respects ward-specifics restricted speech (CAU-3) and does not discuss inscription detail anywhere; her extraction-escort work put her near it often enough that she has disciplined silence into ordinary habit. She has stood as witness in magistrate-court captured-bandit prosecutions (CF-0034 §Law extension), given testimony flat and numerical, and left. She has not been prosecuted for anything. Her 12 Kiln Lane auxiliary role — like Vespera's — sat at the informal-arrangement edge of CF-0024 auxiliary-contractor commission space; Aldous ran CF-0006 extraction and she stood perimeter, so the legal framing held.

**Religion / ritual authority** (INSTITUTIONS.md §Religion; CF-0036 sectarian firewalls): nominal common-pantheon adherent in the minimum civic-ceremony sense — she does hearth-prayer in someone else's house when their custom asks for it, and she attends charter-day procession in towns performing one because not doing so costs reputation capital she will not spend. She has no progenitor-cult lineage (as baseline human she has no species-specific progenitor tradition in the PEOPLES Cluster A sense). She is not a principled refuser (CF-0026) — she has taken artifact-adjacent commissions, including the 12 Kiln Lane extraction-escort, and will take them again. She has no sympathy for progenitor-supremacist doctrine (CF-0036 contested-canon fringe) and reads it with cold contempt when it shows up in her path; the tavern joke-threshold and the good-joke/bad-joke pedagogy (EVERYDAY_LIFE.md (a) Leisure extension per CF-0036) she observes cleanly because contractor-crew cohesion across species is operational, not ideological, and she does not confuse the two.

**Employer / guild / lord / state** (INSTITUTIONS.md §Trade/Guilds + CF-0024): no permanent employer, no guild membership, no standing retainer. She works piecework — posted contracts from Mudbrook's lockmaster-wall and tavern notice-boards (CF-0024 visible consequences; EVERYDAY_LIFE.md (a) Leisure extension); occasional commissioned work from chartered extraction-guild contractor-auxiliary rosters (CF-0024 + INSTITUTIONS.md §Artifact-Extraction Guilds contractor-auxiliary roster clause), which is what the 12 Kiln Lane job was; rare noble-estate close-protection commissions vetted through factor (CF-0024 estate-steward vetting, EVERYDAY_LIFE.md (b) Labor rhythm extension); regular caravan-coalition escort contracts on the canal-heartland mainline; and CF-0034 bandit-hunter bounty-contracts when corridor seasons sharpen. She is a named veteran — "Threadscar" is a portable inter-polity reputation object in the CF-0024 Value Stores sense — which means her negotiation capacity at the top of the hazard-pay range is real, unlike tavern-board new-hires who absorb hazard at underpriced rates. She has declined advisory-and-teaching-post offers (mentioned in brief) on grounds she herself cannot fully articulate; the decline is real institutional data that magistrate-court or civic-advisory panel observers would classify as ambiguous.

**Military / defense** (INSTITUTIONS.md §Military + CF-0020 + CF-0024): no current levy obligation in Mudbrook. She has done mercenary-band siege work across multiple skirmish-seasons (CF-0024 mercenary-band subtype; INSTITUTIONS.md §Military internal-contradictions) and has a working reputation among band-organizers as a reliable heavy-infantry/close-protection hire. She is not a chartered dragoon (CF-0033) — not recruited from ward-resident rolls, not civic-treasury-paid, no pensionable-service register. She has not done CF-0028 patron-funded ruin-expedition work and has not pursued those rosters; her brief specifies bandits, caravans, sieges, and close protection as her bread and butter, which means she has stayed clear of the expedition-share register deliberately, whether she has articulated that to herself or not.

**Debt** (ECONOMY_AND_RESOURCES.md + SOC-3): no standing coin or in-kind debt. She holds her rental cottage on ordinary heartland-landlord terms and has never missed a payment. She has money in reserve — silver, not copper — enough to absorb a rotation with no contract, which is a cushion most of the contractor stratum cannot afford (CF-0024 costs-and-limits: tavern-board new-hires vs reputable veterans).

**Local taboo system** (INSTITUTIONS.md §Taboo + CAU-3 + CF-0036): she observes ward-specifics restricted speech (CAU-3) without conscious effort. She observes the tavern joke-threshold in mixed company cleanly (CF-0036 EVERYDAY_LIFE.md (a) Leisure extension — no mother-species rhymes, no bodily-needs mockery, never cross the line about another crew-member's parent species). She has a dry-tavern register of species-humor she uses sparingly and in kind. She respects carnivore-folk butchery access and has fought beside enough Cluster A and Cluster B folk that crew-composition is operational vocabulary, not ideological concession. She will not work with a foreman whose mix-sound judgment (CF-0036 labor-rhythm extension — *"mix-sound crew?"* hire-catechism) is poor, and has walked off at least one job for that reason.

**Literacy / schooling** (DIS-2 + EVERYDAY_LIFE.md (a) schooling): literate in trade-tongue and in heartland regional vernacular. Numerate for contract accounting, payroll, and dividing hazard-pay shares across a mercenary-band. No monastic or charter-school seal. She reads broadsheets at the Mudbrook Municipal Aid Registry where Copperplate works, which is part of what made the Copperplate relationship — he is one of the few people whose procedural weight unsettles her without threatening her, and he watches her read the broadsheets in his quiet register.

**Inheritance** (INSTITUTIONS.md §Landholding/Family): nothing to inherit; nothing to bequeath under civic registry. Her longsword, her medicine-kit, and her cottage's deposit-coin are the only items that would require disposition. She has not named an heir on any registry. The realistic disposition — if she thought about it, which she is beginning to — would be Rill for the field-kit and the work-knowledge, and a quiet cash bequest to Bertram for the gear he has fitted her into across decades.

**Landholding**: none — a renter, not a titled holder (ECONOMY_AND_RESOURCES.md Inequality Patterns — she sits in the urban-skilled-transient band, above day-labor, below guild-master coin-wealth, outside the tenant-rural tier altogether).

**Healing / medicine** (INSTITUTIONS.md §Healing + CF-0024 Medicine extension): she accesses Mudbrook's barber-surgeon and herb-wife network as any canal-town resident does (EVERYDAY_LIFE.md (a) Medicine). Her own field-medicine competence is the contractor-empirical lineage INSTITUTIONS.md §Healing names — deep-cut suturing, bite and claw-puncture care, fallout-exposure assessment she has learned on extraction-escort jobs, post-battle sepsis control. She is better than Vespera's patchwork tier — she has kept more people alive than Vespera has — but she is not a barber-surgeon and does not pretend otherwise; in the triage hierarchy her job ends where the proper healer's job begins.

**Burial / death management** (INSTITUTIONS.md §Burial): no committed arrangement. If she dies in Mudbrook she will receive civic-cemetery burial under her registry entry; if she dies on contract she will receive whatever local custom offers, which she has attended often enough to have no illusions about. She has not paid into a guild pension (not chartered) and has no widow or widower to receive dragoon-backed or contamination-lineage civic-pension residue. Her funerary would fall into the CF-0024 contractor-veteran register — family-and-tavern, no civic coverage, a tavern-veteran account as the durable memorial.

**Recordkeeping / archives / myth transmission** (INSTITUTIONS.md §Recordkeeping + CF-0024 contracted-bard extension): she exists in the civic registry as a hired-veteran contractor of long standing; her name appears in magistrate witness-rolls and in bounty-clerk payout ledgers across multiple heartland polities. In the bardic register she exists as a named-veteran reputation in the CF-0024 tavern-veteran subgenre — not inflated by patron-commissioned bards, mostly dry-cadence, sometimes garbled by unfamiliar performers. She has not commissioned a bard to carry her reputation; her reputation travels on its own through contract-completion and tavern-witness. The "Threadscar" incident is folk-assumption heroic in some tellings she has overheard; she has not corrected the tellings because correcting them would require explaining the confined-space situation and she will not.

## Epistemic Position

**Known firsthand** — she has witnessed, experienced, or handled:
- conventional combat across all her contract-types: caravan-ambush, siege-line, close-protection engagement, tavern-fight, bandit-corridor pursuit, siege-tower clearance, shield-line collapse, rear-guard action (CF-0020 + CF-0024; INSTITUTIONS.md §Military)
- forty-seven killings, remembered at the level of technique, location, circumstance — older faces beginning to blur, which concerns her less than she thinks it should
- battlefield medicine in the contractor-empirical register across thirty years of application (CF-0024 Medicine; INSTITUTIONS.md §Healing)
- extraction-escort work on multiple chartered-guild commissions including the 12 Kiln Lane ceramic-extraction job with Aldous, Vespera, Bertram, and Rill — she stood perimeter, she watched Aldous work, she handled chicken-restraint during the extraction, she observed the bleed-through at the CAU-2 public-knowledge register, she recognized the procedure as successful when the chickens afterward behaved normally
- CF-0034 bandit-hunter work across multiple corridor seasons — settlement-hire bounties, tavern-board bounty-postings, captured-bandit delivery for magistrate-court trial, hostage-recovery and ransom-broker negotiation she has observed but not itself brokered
- mercenary-band siege work in multiple inter-community skirmishes (CF-0024 mercenary-band subtype; INSTITUTIONS.md §Military internal-contradictions)
- the Charter-Era tavern texture across heartland polities — posting-wall postings, tavern-keeper vouch economics, lockmaster posting-wall reading, caravanserai hiring register (CF-0024 visible consequences; EVERYDAY_LIFE.md (a) Leisure)
- ward-marker public recognition (CAU-3 public-knowledge layer); the procedural signs of ward-breach drill in canal-heartland towns, learned by living through them
- winter-fever seasons, survived (CF-0014; PEOPLES §Humans vulnerability)
- the particular calm that comes before others begin making demands — she knows what the room is about to do before anyone in it does, and she knows that knowing is not a gift in a way she has words for
- the confined-space incident fifteen years ago that gave her the nickname — not the operational details, which remain private, but the fact of it and its cost in body

**Known by rumor** — she has heard from tavern-mates, fellow contractors, bounty-clerks, magistrate witnesses, circuit bards:
- named bandit-captain bardic cycles across heartland corridors (CF-0034 + M-14 — she holds the pragmatic mixed-reading: some named captains are real people she or her peers have pursued or seen pursued; some are composites she recognizes in the cadence; some are probably bardic invention; she pays the bounty on the one standing in front of her and does not care about the question in the abstract)
- artifact-extraction guild internal politics — the containment-wright/broker schism she has overheard from Aldous in unguarded moments (CF-0021 + INSTITUTIONS.md §Artifact-Extraction Guilds schism register)
- polity-asymmetric crafter-tolerance (CF-0021) and mercenary-licensure (CF-0024) — she knows which heartland polities jail crafter-caught workshops and which license, which polities' mercenary-band memberships will get her arrested if she crosses the charter line, and she plans her rotations accordingly
- CF-0033 canal-corridor quarantine dragoon adoption debates where relevant — she has drunk in taverns of adopting polities and non-adopting polities and knows the idiom-shift; she holds no partisan position on adoption but can read a civic register within minutes of arriving in a town
- named occult-fallout specialists circulating in bardic transmission (CF-0025 + M-7 — she holds the procedural-competence reading, with a flat acknowledgment that bardic accretion does outrun case-knowledge; she does not treat any specialist's name as oracle)
- kiln-explosion incidents and the Incident-Wave reattribution debates (CF-0021 named kiln-explosion lineage; TIMELINE Layer 3 Crafter-Attempt Sub-Stream)
- the principled-refuser tradition (CF-0026) — she has argued against and with refusers in taverns for thirty years; she respects some of them personally and has never been converted
- the two bad winter-fever years' demographic consequences and bandit-recruitment-feeder intensification (TIMELINE Layer 4 + CF-0034 Layer-3/Layer-4 convergence); she has seen the feeder-patterns firsthand in her last two rotations
- CF-0036 tavern silenced-contractor ballad subgenre where it has crossed her hearing — itinerant-bard register, scarred AES-1 cadence; she recognizes the subgenre as real and as distinct from sectarian-supremacist inflation, and she marks the breach when sectarian-commissioned bards try to recruit through it
- the dowager-gossip circuit's mixed-species-household and mix-sound-house registers in estate work she has crossed through (EVERYDAY_LIFE.md (b) estate Aging-extended per CF-0036); not her social tier but audible when she has stood close-protection in a great hall

**Cannot know** — spatially, institutionally, or epistemically out of reach:
- what ended the Maker civilization (M-1); she has no view and knows no one who has one that she trusts
- who or what made catastrophic-class artifacts (M-2); these do not enter her professional path and she has never tried to learn
- the mechanism of vessel-hosted agencies in modern crafted artifacts (M-6); the 12 Kiln Lane work was CF-0006 extraction from host animals, not CF-0021 crafted-vessel work, and she does not have the extraction-guild vocabulary to classify what Aldous did at any level deeper than procedural
- the mechanism of Maker-Age guardian constructions (M-8); she has not done CF-0028 ruin-expedition work and has no professional approach to the question
- the epistemic content of recovered Maker-knowledge (M-9); not her register
- guardian-presence heterogeneity patterns (M-10); not her register
- the empirical basis of the three-generation contamination-lineage marker (M-11); she knows the CF-0031 civic-register exists where polities have adopted and has an opinion on its welfare-wedge politics (she supports it for widow-supplement reasons and distrusts its surveillance-risk reasons equally), but she has no view on the three-generation interval's etiology
- the historical origin of the oversize-saddlery subsection (M-12); she has commissioned body-plan-variant work for Cluster C crew-members and cares only that the work is delivered to specification
- the institutional contingency of the dragoon form (M-13); she has watched adoption and non-adoption from the outside across multiple polities and holds no partisan position
- the guild-internal vessel-preparation technique that gates crafter success (CF-0021); it is not in her hands and never will be
- the detailed ward-inscription patterns restricted by CAU-3; she is not guild and does not want to be
- the Maker-Age linguistic system (CF-0023); she has never held a grimoire-leaf and has declined to buy one when offered
- the historical origin of supremacist-cannibal sectarian doctrine (M-16), the demographic scope of interspecies-cannibal cases (M-17), and the antiquity of civic-suppression protocol for interspecies-predation cases (M-18); she has encountered CF-0036 raid-aftermath in her long career enough to know the pattern exists and enough to have declined sectarian-supremacist recruiter approaches with contempt, but she has not encountered sealed-docket material and has no professional access to the civic-suppression register
- the rumor-register gargantuan-underground phenomenon (M-15); she has heard tavern rumors of the Cold-Valley Old One and the Deep-Selk Thing and holds them as rumor — she does not perform deep-wilderness expedition work and the rumor-register material is not operationally actionable for her
- the reputation-genealogy of specific fallout-specialists whose names she has heard (M-7); she holds the procedural-competence reading and will not treat any specialist's silence as oracular

**Wrongly believes** — folk theories and inherited interpretations she holds lightly and uses operationally, knowing they are not world-confirmed:
- the popular cautionary reading that the Makers "consumed themselves with their own magic" (M-1 common-interpretation permitted layer; held loosely as a thing-some-people-say that her professional register has no reason to contradict; she does not hold it as private conviction but she does not refuse the frame when it comes up in tavern conversation)
- her own superstitions-in-professional-shape: the boot-lace check, the sugar-bun, the dawn weapons-rota before other work — she calls these markers and routines, she knows in unguarded moments they are superstitions, and she maintains them as if they were operational procedures; the private self-description is partial and she knows it is partial
- a quiet general belief that procedural-competence accounts for most things attributed to artifact-fallout specialists (M-7 procedural-competence reading); she acknowledges this is a working posture, not a world-truth
- a quiet general belief that heroic bardic cycles are for people who did not fight (AES-1 aligned); she knows some bardic cycles are more accurate than she gives them credit for and holds the belief anyway

**Vocabulary she has** — trade-tongue; heartland regional dialect; numerate contract language (hazard-pay tiers, share-split arithmetic, coin-vs-in-kind conversion, tavern-vouch register); public ward terminology ("ward," "breach," "sealed quarter," "bleed-through," "perimeter," "cordon-marker," "three-note whistle"); tactical-military vocabulary (flanking, pressure, siege logic, clearing, storming, holding, folding, line, formation, breach, rout, push, salient); contractor-stratum vernacular ("hired," "posted," "tavern-vouch," "hazard pay," "widow-of-the-job," "takes the work," "refused the work," "paid on delivery," "scarred," "handler of fallout"); CF-0034 bandit-stratum vernacular ("the hollow," "walked south," "corridor-season," "waiting-wolves"); field-medicine jargon; Cluster A and Cluster B body-language and species-typical vocabulary sufficient to work with mixed crews; EVERYDAY_LIFE.md (a) tavern-keeper-vouch and crew-master mix-sound-hire catechism vocabulary; courtesy-minimum common-pantheon and progenitor-deference register.

**Vocabulary she lacks / categories she does not have** — guild-internal ward-inscription technical jargon (CAU-3 restricted; she knows she does not have it and has no ambition to); guild-internal vessel-preparation terminology (CF-0021 guild-internal, not leaked); Maker-Age linguistic system (CF-0023 never fully recovered); sectarian theological vocabulary beyond tavern-recognition register; estate-aristocracy interior register (dowager-gossip idiom she reads as outsider, not native); CF-0033 dragoon internal procedural vocabulary beyond public-observation register; CF-0028 expedition-contractor technical vocabulary and scholar-contractor authentication jargon; CF-0031 contamination-lineage scrivener-convention interior language; fenland relay-summoning ritual vocabulary (CF-0024 fenland variant — she does not work fen contracts); monastic-infirmary theological-medical framing; the emotional-intimacy vocabulary she has watched other people use and cannot reliably produce.

## Goals and Pressures

**Short-term goal** (days to weeks): complete the Mudbrook rotation she is currently on — finish triaging Rill and Bertram's 12 Kiln Lane injuries into handoff for the proper healer, satisfy the remaining contracted days for the chicken-extraction commission, collect Aldous's final payout, and close the ledger-entry. Under that, a second short-term goal she has not fully acknowledged to herself: do not let Rill drift while Melissa attends to the triage logistics. The girl watched Melissa work on real injuries during the extraction and took her own chest wounds without panicking; the window for building the apprenticeship is now, not next season.

**Long-term desire** (years to lifetime): to retire with her mind and body and professional reputation all intact enough that the transition from working-weapon to something else does not feel like a surrender — and to pass the working-knowledge she has built onto someone who will keep it working rather than lose it or romanticize it. She has not articulated this as a single desire. She has articulated each half separately and believes (wrongly, in a way the brief makes visible) that the two halves are independent.

**Unavoidable obligation** (institutional, familial, ritual, material): SOC-3 coin-contract sacredness is the foundation her entire economic existence rests on. Her top-tier portable reputation (CF-0024 Value Stores) means an oath-breach would cost her more than a tavern-board new-hire's breach costs them, because she is at the level where contract-breach cascade (ECONOMY_AND_RESOURCES.md Breakage Points) would ripple through multiple inter-polity patron networks simultaneously. She has never broken one, including the Aldous silver-split the brief names and the triage-obligation to Rill and Bertram currently in play. Secondary obligation: the triage work on Rill and Bertram is not contract-governed — it is professional-standard contractor-triage (CF-0024 Medicine extension) — and she is treating it with the same discipline she treats contracted work, because the distinction between contracted and non-contracted stops mattering at her tier.

**Social fear**: being asked to smile. Being asked to perform a register she does not have — warmth, charm, easy charisma, emotional legibility-on-demand. The fear reads on her as resentment at "emotional ambushes" (brief); underneath, it is the fear that when someone demands a social performance she cannot supply, what shows instead is the absence of the person they were expecting, and the absence is not something she can hide behind a longsword.

**Private shame**: the grieving mother at the job she no longer thinks about deliberately. The mother asked how her son died and Melissa gave her a clean, precise tactical explanation — angle, blood loss, likely pain, useful information — believing, correctly in her profession's terms and catastrophically in the mother's terms, that usefulness mattered more than comfort. The slap and the told-you-killed-him-twice still do not resolve for her. She avoids families of the dead now, which is the only adjustment she has been able to make. She suspects the adjustment is insufficient. She has not been able to figure out what a sufficient adjustment would look like.

**External pressure** (from Phase 0 major_local_pressures): the age-and-body decline against her top-tier reputation produces the specific current pressure — every slower recovery, every cold-weather flare-up of an old injury, every younger fighter's unfamiliar rhythm she has to calculate instead of instinct through — is evidence that the weapon is wearing out while the market still pays for it. Incident Wave continues to feed extraction-escort work into her rotations; the CF-0034 recruitment-feeder intensification from bad winter-fever years means bandit-corridor contract volume is up; the CF-0024 reputation-retention dynamic means her advisory-and-teaching offers are arriving and multiplying. Registrar Copperplate's question — *what category would you file yourself under if you stopped fighting* — presses from outside the professional frame altogether and will not let her resolve the above pressures within the professional frame, which is where she knows how to work.

**Internal contradiction** (instantiating WORLD_KERNEL core pressure at individual scale): she is extraordinarily good at surviving and no longer sure that survival is the same thing as living. AES-1 as world-level invariant — *heroism is paid in coin and scars, not glory* — becomes at her scale a personal fate; she is the coin-and-scars payment, accumulated. The WORLD_KERNEL line *every generation pays Maker debts* (Core Pressures) is not a cosmological statement to her but a job-description: she has paid, continuously, for thirty years. The contradiction she cannot yet resolve is that the payment has kept her alive and has also hollowed out the space where the reasons to stay alive were supposed to go. She does not have the vocabulary to name the hollowing. She has the vocabulary to describe the mechanism.

## Capabilities

### Close combat — melee, grappling, defensive resolve, composure under pressure

- **how_learned**: the brief's specified "amalgam of military close-quarters training, gladiatorial technique, and mercenary practicality" — the specific institutional path is not committed (she does not volunteer the sequence and the brief respects the omission), but the plausible route is early military service or levy, followed by mercenary-band integration early in her career, then thirty years of field application across CF-0024 subtypes. Per CF-0020's "prior military service or trained fighting experience" prerequisite, the capability path is ordinary for her stratum; the depth and breadth of application are where she sits above the stratum median.
- **cost_to_acquire**: time — decades — and body — forty-seven killings, numerous scars, the confined-space incident that named her, cumulative joint-wear, the darkened shoulder-patch a careful herb-wife would notice. Also social standing: contractor-stratum existence is compatible with civic respectability but does not produce it; she is ordinary-stratum and will never be mistaken for aristocracy or guild-master regardless of her reputation tier. Also relational: she does not have a household because the career did not leave one space for one.
- **teachers_institutions**: unchartered — early military or levy service (unspecified polity), then mercenary-band mentorship and in-field correction by senior contractors, ongoing circuit-veteran exchange with peers. No guild seal, no chartered-martial order. CF-0020 and CF-0024 both place this capability-path in unchartered-veteran territory by design.
- **unusual_or_ordinary**: CF-0020 + CF-0024 make close combat capability ORDINARY for her stratum; there is nothing world-unique about her being able to fight. Her composure-under-pressure and her tactical reading are at the unusual end, stabilized by the memory-erosion cost the brief makes explicit — the threat-reading is reflexive because it no longer costs attention; the cost is displaced into the fact that older killings have begun to blur, which she treats as data about herself. No distribution exception required.
- **body_class_place_shape**: human frame — 5'11", lean-muscular, solid-for-function-not-display (PEOPLES §Humans baseline). No species-specific combat advantage; no natural weapons. Her ranged work (bow, crossbow where polity permits) is serviceable, not exceptional — she knows raptor-folk archers outrange her (PEOPLES Cluster B raptor-folk clause) and does not pretend otherwise. The canal-heartland work environment — siege lines, bandit corridors, tavern-brawl context, close-protection geometry, extraction-escort perimeter work — has shaped her technique toward close-quarters and grappling, paid in heartland climate (tolerable for her frame, moderate in drylands rotation, increasingly punishing in cold-north winter contracts she now declines). She is aging and can feel it — joint-wear, recovery-time, cold-weather flare in the nickname-scar tissue — which she treats as a variable in the tactical problem, not a confession.

### Tactical threat-reading and room-mapping

- **how_learned**: not trained as a discrete skill, but accumulated across decades of field application; the brief names it as reflexive ("she no longer experiences it as a choice") and specifies that she reads rooms as maps of exits, angles, weaknesses, fracture points. Cross-references Phase 1 close-combat capability but is distinguishable — the reading is cognitive, not kinetic; she can do it unarmed at a dinner party, and the skill is doing the reading while passing for someone who is not doing the reading.
- **cost_to_acquire**: thirty years of practice; the private cost that the brief makes explicit — regarding people in operational terms and sorting them into threats/liabilities/assets reliably enough that she has difficulty switching registers when the situation asks for something else. The grieving mother incident is the specific instance of this cost in the prose register; it is not an abstract hypothetical.
- **teachers_institutions**: none formal — self-trained through contractor volume. No institutional lineage.
- **unusual_or_ordinary**: above-ordinary for the CF-0020 / CF-0024 stratum, but not rare in the sense that many long-careered contractor-veterans develop some version of it. Her version is at the high end of the stratum — thirty-year careers produce the pattern across the stratum; her contractor-tier reputation reflects (in part) that her pattern is reliable. Rule-3 stabilizer: the skill is not free. The memory-erosion she describes (older faces blurring) is the cost; the interpretive-register damage the grieving mother incident names is the cost; the incapacity to hold emotional-intimacy terrain is the cost. The reading does not produce an insight-about-people separate from the tactical use of people, which is the specific limit.
- **body_class_place_shape**: human-baseline perception — no species-specific advantage in low-light, scent, hearing, or vibration-sense; she works in well-lit rooms and open spaces preferentially. Shaped by class: ordinary-stratum contractor exposure gives her sheer volume of rooms to practice in. Shaped by place: canal-heartland tavern-and-caravanserai work provides the specific room types her pattern is calibrated for.

### Field medicine — triage, deep-cut suturing, bite/claw-puncture care, post-battle sepsis control, fallout-exposure assessment

- **how_learned**: self-taught in field application, refined by herb-wife and barber-surgeon exchanges on rotation — the exact pathway INSTITUTIONS.md §Healing names as the contractor-empirical triage lineage (CF-0024 Medicine extension; EVERYDAY_LIFE.md (a) Medicine extension).
- **cost_to_acquire**: patients she lost who might have lived with better care; one specific early-career failure she does not discuss; the recurring fact that field-medicine competence at her tier means people look to her when things go wrong and there is no time to deflect the responsibility; the material cost of keeping the field-kit stocked (cauterizing kit, suturing-thread, burn-salve, anti-sepsis compound from chartered apothecaries at silver rates).
- **teachers_institutions**: informal — herb-wives and barber-surgeons she has exchanged observations with across her circuit; senior contractor-mentors in her early career. Not monastic-certified, not barber-surgeon-chartered. INSTITUTIONS.md §Healing is explicit that this lineage is not chartered.
- **unusual_or_ordinary**: ORDINARY for the top tier of the CF-0024 contractor stratum. Her competence is above the tavern-board new-hire bar and below the barber-surgeon-master bar — solid, reliable, empirical, aware of its own edge. No distribution exception.
- **body_class_place_shape**: human hand-dexterity suffices for suturing and wound-packing (PEOPLES §Humans baseline). Canal-heartland access to apothecaries and herb-wives supplies her caseload and her supply chain; her caseload across CF-0024 subtypes (caravan, siege, close-protection, extraction-escort, bandit-hunter) defines the injury types she is fluent with. She has handled Cluster A and Cluster B patients and knows the species-compatibility limits; she refers Cluster C or Cluster D patients to species-specialist consultants where available, which in small canal-heartland towns often means referral-to-larger-town.

### Mercenary-band warfare, siege work, close protection, extraction-escort (CF-0024 subtypes)

- **how_learned**: accumulated across thirty years of CF-0024 posted-contract and commissioned work. The specific subtype blend — caravan escort, siege, close protection, extraction-escort, and CF-0034 bandit-hunter — matches the brief's framing of her bread-and-butter work.
- **cost_to_acquire**: time; body; the specific relational cost that itinerant contractor-veteran life produces no stable community — her professional contacts (Bertram, Aldous, Vespera, Copperplate, Rill) are what the brief names as her "specific relationships," and that set is roughly complete; she does not have a larger network because thirty years of rotation has selected for durable-few over frequent-many.
- **teachers_institutions**: unchartered — mercenary-band organizers she worked under early in her career; senior extraction-escort contractors she apprenticed herself to across commissions; the accumulating corpus of her own experience. No chartered mercenary-company membership; she has moved in and out of bands across polity lines and CF-0024 §Military licensure asymmetry makes her rotate which polities she works in accordingly.
- **unusual_or_ordinary**: CF-0024 places all these subtypes at ORDINARY-stratum status; her named-veteran-tier ("Threadscar" reputation) is at the upper end of the ordinary distribution, stabilized by CF-0024 reputation-slow-build and SOC-3 oath-record. No distribution exception.
- **body_class_place_shape**: as above for close combat; additionally, canal-heartland mainline geography shapes her rotation toward canal-and-barge travel and heartland-wildland-road connector work; her decline of highland cold-pass deep-winter contracts and fenland rotations is a reasoned body-and-climate decision within the frame CF-0024 supplies.

### Occult-fallout auxiliary labor (under commission; not CF-0025 specialist proper)

- **how_learned**: accumulated across multiple extraction-escort commissions as chartered-guild contractor-auxiliary (CF-0024 auxiliary-roster clause; INSTITUTIONS.md §Artifact-Extraction Guilds contractor-auxiliary rosters); the 12 Kiln Lane chicken-extraction with Aldous is the most recent instance. She has stood perimeter during extraction, handled bystander-suppression, restrained afflicted hosts during ceramic-vessel containment, observed but not performed inscription and neutralization. She does not read grimoire-leaves, does not handle containment-grade ceramic, does not operate wards — these remain CF-0006/CF-0007/CF-0008 chartered functions per CF-0024's guild-charter ceiling.
- **cost_to_acquire**: commission-cycle bargaining with chartered extraction-guild vetters; the darkened shoulder-patch a herb-wife would notice (cumulative low-tier contamination exposure of the CF-0024 extraction-escort sub-pattern, not CF-0025 chronic-specialist level); the specific wear-and-tear of being near extraction events regularly enough to have developed CAU-2 public-knowledge fluency she sometimes catches herself reading into situations where civilians would not.
- **teachers_institutions**: Aldous and prior chartered extraction-guild extractors on whose commissions she has served auxiliary; no formal CF-0025 specialist apprenticeship. She is clearly NOT a CF-0025 occult-fallout specialist in the career-arc sense — she has not accumulated the contamination-injury patterns the CF-0025 veteran-stratum carries (INSTITUTIONS.md §Healing + ECONOMY_AND_RESOURCES.md Inequality Patterns). She is a CF-0024 extraction-escort auxiliary with a frequency-of-commissions pattern that is higher than the stratum median but lower than the specialist-lineage threshold.
- **unusual_or_ordinary**: ORDINARY per CF-0024 auxiliary-roster framework; she is a repeat-commissioned contractor-auxiliary, not a specialist. Her repeat-commission frequency is at the upper end of the auxiliary pattern but does not cross the CF-0025 specialist boundary because she does not perform fallout-containment as primary work — she performs general-contractor work that periodically includes extraction-escort. No distribution exception; CF-0024 + INSTITUTIONS.md §Artifact-Extraction Guilds commissioned-auxiliary clause covers her position cleanly.
- **body_class_place_shape**: human baseline; the canal-heartland context — Mudbrook as a canal-town where the Incident-Wave era has produced above-average extraction-commission volume (TIMELINE Layer 4) — shapes the opportunity set. Not tied to species-specific embodiment.

### Informal mentorship and teaching (CF-0024 reputation transmission; ordinary-stratum)

- **how_learned**: she has taught across her career in the ordinary contractor-stratum sense — senior-to-junior correction on job, apprentice-in-all-but-name pairings during skirmish-seasons — without framing the activity as a discrete role; the Rill arrangement is the first time she has considered it as a deliberate undertaking (brief: "the first person Melissa considers worth the risk of serious investment").
- **cost_to_acquire**: attention, time, the specific cost of admitting that the working-knowledge she has built is mortal along with her body — that transmission is its only durable form; the cost of watching someone young take chest wounds and not knowing yet whether that means the apprenticeship is possible or that her investment will cost someone their life.
- **teachers_institutions**: none formal; mentors in her own early career are vague in her memory at this point. Her current teaching is experiential — show the work, observe whether the apprentice freezes or functions when reality turns ugly. EVERYDAY_LIFE.md (a) Oral-storytelling and CF-0024 reputation-transmission register both describe this informal lineage as ordinary for her stratum.
- **unusual_or_ordinary**: ORDINARY for CF-0024 senior-veteran-tier; experienced contractors often take on informal apprenticeship arrangements (CF-0024 visible-consequences: reputation-transmission via the bardic circuit and tavern-veteran account). Her version is at the upper end in the sense that her professional reputation makes the apprenticeship valuable to Rill in a way a tavern-board new-hire's mentorship would not be. No distribution exception.
- **body_class_place_shape**: human baseline; Mudbrook-canal-heartland as the working context (Rill is a waystation family's seventeen-year-old from the north road); human-baseline teaching fits human-baseline apprentice, though she has worked with cross-species apprenticeships in informal capacity earlier in her career.

## Voice and Perception

Her **preferred metaphors** code-switch almost entirely inside the combat-and-siege register: stance, timing, opening, fold, line, pressure, breach, cordon, salient, flanking, storming vs clearing, formation, collapse, rout, push. She describes people's posture in combat-terms; she describes tavern rooms in siege-logic ("where the fracture point would open if you pressed here"); she describes Rill's progress as defensive-doctrine development and Aldous's work as containment-geometry. The register has a secondary thread of field-medicine vocabulary — triage, stabilize, handoff, bleed-control — which she uses when emotional terrain is involved because she has no other vocabulary for emotional terrain that does not feel to her like a register she cannot perform honestly. She does not reach for musical or artistic metaphor (she is not Vespera); she does not reach for religious metaphor; she does not reach for animal-kingdom metaphor (baseline-human, not progenitor-cult-affiliated).

Her **education** is trade-tongue-literate, numerate for contract and payroll, broadsheet-fluent in the Registrar's office (where Copperplate's quiet presence lets her read), no monastic or charter-school seal — ordinary DIS-2 partial-literacy for her stratum and class (EVERYDAY_LIFE.md (a) schooling).

Her **rhythm of speech** is clipped, direct, and functional — brief-specified. Tactical readouts delivered as ordinary observation; assessments of people delivered as operational intake; emotional demands reframed as tactical problems (the brief's "variables in a tactical problem rather than confessions"). Her voice has a vein of deadpan dark humor that surfaces under pressure — reducing dramatic situations to threat-budgets and operational realities. She can be dryly funny and barely notice; she does not perform humor, it occurs as a byproduct of speaking accurately about situations that are ridiculous. AES-1 is her voice register by default: coin-and-scars pragmatism, never heroic-romantic bravado, never inflated. She uses CF-0024 tavern-veteran cadence cleanly — *"we took the contract; two of us came back; the silver cleared"* — and recognizes the CF-0036 silenced-contractor subgenre when she hears it, marking the sectarian-inflation breach by register without having to think about it.

Her **taboo words** — she does not discuss ward-inscription specifics (CAU-3 restricted speech; her extraction-escort rotation makes the silence ordinary). She does not use sectarian-supremacist register under any circumstance; CF-0036 contested-canon fringe doctrine is outside her vocabulary by temperament as well as by civic-respect. She does not use euphemism for killings in her professional-accounting register — she says "killed" when she means killed, "stopped" when she means stopped, and distinguishes the two because the distinction is operational. In mixed-species taverns she maintains the good-joke/bad-joke threshold cleanly (CF-0036 EVERYDAY_LIFE.md (a) Leisure extension). She does not describe her own body in the aging-weakness register she privately tracks — the brief makes explicit that she resents being asked to name it — and she does not describe the confined-space incident beyond the nickname-fact that circulates from it. She does not use the grieving mother's language.

**What she notices first in a room**: exits; then armed people, sorted by probable competence; then the room's geometry — fracture points, sight-lines, cover; then tempo (who is drunk, who is tired, who is watching without meaning to); then civilians under the tactical layer, sorted into threats/liabilities/assets. Per brief, this reads as a map. She can do it in a dinner party.

**What she overlooks**: uncomplicated care directed at her. She notices it (the brief is explicit: she saw Rill and Bertram take the wounds at 12 Kiln Lane and her response was triage, which is the care-register she does know). What she cannot do reliably is recognize when the care is about her in particular as opposed to functional care about a person — when someone is seeing her, she routes the seeing into an interpretive register she can handle, which is threat-and-liability, and the category-error is expensive. She also overlooks people's departures from her orbit until they have already happened (brief: "she has lost allies simply by failing to notice they were drifting away until they were already gone"); her tactical reading is not calibrated for relational drift because relational drift does not look like threat.

**Species/body perception effects** (PEOPLES §Humans senses clause): human-baseline vision, hearing, scent, touch — no species-specific advantage. Her perceptual edge comes from practice-volume, not embodiment. She does not have the cat-folk low-light vision Vespera uses, the canid-folk scent-tracking a wolf-folk caravan-partner would rely on, or the hare-folk hearing that out-ranges her at outdoor perimeter work. She knows this; she calibrates her crew-composition accordingly when she has the choice; in mixed crews she has learned where to position non-human-folk to compensate for her baseline perception and where to position herself to let their embodiment do the work. Her tail-and-ear reading of Cluster A body language is practiced and reasonably fluent — thirty years of working with animal-folk contractor-peers has taught her what to read — but it is practice, not native species-legibility, and in unfamiliar species contexts she defers to a crew-mate's reading.

## Contradictions and Tensions

**Central contradiction**: she is a weapon afraid of rust. She is extraordinarily good at surviving, and no longer sure that survival is the same thing as living. The work that has kept her alive has also hollowed out the space where the reasons to stay alive were supposed to go, and the professional competence that makes her valuable is the exact instrument of the hollowing. She cannot refuse field-capable work without admitting the aging she does not want to admit; she cannot accept an advisory-or-teaching post without admitting the same, only from the other direction. The resolution she has available inside the professional frame is *continue until the body refuses*, which is a plan that is also an abdication. The resolution she has available outside the professional frame requires a vocabulary she does not have. Registrar Copperplate's question — *what category would you file yourself under if you stopped fighting?* — is the diegetic form of the contradiction, asked by someone her tactical reading cannot dismiss, and she cannot answer it. She would like to. She has not figured out how.

**Tension map**: the central contradiction connects outward to every element of her embedding. Her **short-term goal** (complete the triage, close the rotation, not let Rill drift) is compatible with the contradiction because it keeps her inside the professional frame that is where she can work; her **long-term desire** (retire intact, pass the knowledge on) requires her to inhabit at least part of the space outside the professional frame, which she cannot. Her **unavoidable obligation** (SOC-3 coin-contract, the top-tier reputation) keeps her in rotation; her **social fear** (being asked to smile, to perform a register she does not have) and her **private shame** (the grieving mother — being operationally correct in a way that was catastrophically wrong humanly) converge on the same axis: the non-combat register is where she cannot locate a stable self. Her **external pressure** — Incident-Wave era + bandit-recruitment intensification + age-decline + succession-opportunity-with-Rill + Copperplate's question — compounds at the axis rather than along it. Her **institutional embedding** (unchartered, itinerant, no household, no guild, no pension, no heir-of-record) leaves her no scaffolding for the transition the contradiction points toward; the scaffolding CF-0024 and AES-1 offer is precisely the scaffolding the contradiction names as insufficient. The 12 Kiln Lane triage register is a small version of the larger question: the work is real, the care is real, and the competence does not resolve into a self that can accept the care directed back. She is in the gap between being a weapon-kept-operational and being a person who has been using the weapon as a substitute for being a person, and she is not yet able to cross it, and the brief does not resolve it.

## Likely Story Hooks

- **Rill's apprenticeship becomes concrete — the transition Melissa has not made deliberately**. The chicken-extraction job made Rill's commitment visible (chest wounds, did not panic, stayed focused); the triage afterward is making Melissa's reciprocal commitment visible to herself in a way she has not been able to refuse. A CF-0034 corridor-season bounty-contract with Rill as apprentice-under-vouch would force Melissa to formalize the register she has been keeping informal. Response register: she will accept if Rill is physically ready, she will decline if the contract's hazard-profile exceeds apprentice-threshold (a distinction she herself will calculate and not negotiate), and she will be privately relieved either way that the decision was made in tactical terms rather than emotional ones.

- **An advisory-and-teaching post at a Mudbrook-adjacent institution arrives formal and dateable** (dragoon-adjacent civic-advisory panel in an adopting polity per CF-0033 CH-0007 EVERYDAY_LIFE.md (a) Aging-extended; chartered extraction-guild training commission for contractor-auxiliary vetting per CF-0024 + INSTITUTIONS.md §Artifact-Extraction Guilds contractor-auxiliary rosters; or a noble-estate close-protection trainer retainer per CF-0024 estate-steward vetting patterns). Response register: she will read the offer tactically, identify the exact concession it demands (the admission of aging she refuses to make), calculate the offer's economic terms accurately, and refuse — with a dry-veteran response that the vetter will understand and not press — because saying yes would feel perilously close to choosing fear over competence. She will know the refusal is also an abdication. She will not say so.

- **A CF-0034 raid-corridor bounty-contract lands in Mudbrook with interspecies-cannibal-band indicators that would route the prosecution to CF-0036 sealed-docket classification**. Response register: she will take the contract because endemic-banditry suppression is her professional register and she does not believe refusal is available; she will recognize the cannibal-band indicators before the settlement council does (her volume-of-experience outruns the council's); she will calibrate the hunter-party composition to include crew-members with the right embodiment (Cluster A scent-tracking; Cluster B hearing) rather than rely on her human-baseline; she will deliver the captured-bandits alive for sealed-docket trial because SOC-3 coin-contract and the trial-not-summary register align there; she will refuse to sing or repeat the cannibal-case details after the docket seals; she will drink alone in the winter-rota for a week afterward and not discuss it.

- **Aldous calls her for a second extraction-escort job, this one with a more actively dangerous host**. Response register: she will take it because the 12 Kiln Lane commission is technically complete and the second is a fresh commission; she will do the triage math before accepting; she will insist Rill not come unless the hazard-profile is inside apprentice-threshold (see first hook — the principle is consistent across her decisions); she will stand perimeter and restrain the host and observe Aldous's work without trying to read it deeper than CAU-2 public-knowledge level; she will accept silver on delivery and not inflate the tavern-veteran account afterward.

- **Registrar Copperplate's question returns, with dateable pressure — the offer of a Municipal Aid Registry civic-advisory position Copperplate himself sponsors** (an ordinary procedural role paid in low silver, sitting-at-a-desk-that-will-outlast-her register). Response register: she will spend longer calculating this one than she expects to. She will not be able to reduce it to a tactical problem because Copperplate's procedural-permanence register resists the reduction. She will decline in the short term because declining is the move her professional frame supplies; she will not be able to forget the question; she will, over a longer arc the brief does not resolve, begin the vocabulary work she does not currently have. Copperplate will file the decline without comment.

- **Vespera Nightwhisper comes to Melissa about Rill's safety after a rumor reaches the bardic circuit** (per Vespera's dossier Phase 9 hook list — "Melissa comes to Vespera because the bardic circuit knows things guild-rosters do not"). The direction in Vespera's dossier runs Melissa → Vespera; a symmetric hook runs Vespera → Melissa: the rumor reaches Vespera first because the circuit runs hotter for performers, and Vespera's post-12-Kiln-Lane fracture makes her attentive in ways she cannot yet name. Response register: Melissa reads Vespera's concern tactically — is the rumor credible, is the threat actionable, what does the intervention cost — and reacts operationally, which is the register Vespera can work with; the scene is also one of the few relational contexts in which Melissa's care-register and an observer's care-register are operating in the same frame without triggering her threat-reflex, because Vespera does not direct the care at Melissa in the manner that would trip it.

## Canon Safety Check Trace

### Phase 7a: Invariant Conformance

- **ONT-1** (sentience requires biological embodiment): PASS — Melissa is a biological embodied human per PEOPLES §Humans; her tactical threat-reading and memory-erosion are biological cognitive patterns, not disembodied mind.
- **ONT-2** (magic exists only as artifact, not learnable art): PASS — she does not cast, does not craft, does not channel; her extraction-escort auxiliary role at 12 Kiln Lane was perimeter/restraint labor (CF-0024 auxiliary), not artifact manipulation; ONT-2 firewall holds.
- **ONT-3** (species do not interbreed): PASS — species-typical human, no children; cross-species relations not present in character-frame (she "does not date," per brief).
- **CAU-1** (artifact effects always cost): PASS — she is not a practitioner; her proximity to the CF-0006 extraction at 12 Kiln Lane is consistent with the "brutal to host" cost she witnessed on the afflicted chickens and with the CAU-1 cost-taxonomy her darkened shoulder-patch instantiates at low-tier auxiliary-exposure scale.
- **CAU-2** (corruption produces diagnostic environmental signals): PASS — she has CAU-3 public-knowledge-layer fluency in bleed-through signs (gloom, dimming light, wrongness) through her extraction-escort rotation; no practitioner-level claim.
- **CAU-3** (wards are public-but-restricted): PASS — she respects ward-specifics restricted speech; the discipline is explicit in her voice section and reflected in her reputation-stability.
- **DIS-1** (artifacts routinely turned up underground): PASS — her extraction-escort experience instantiates routine artifact-unearthing consistent with DIS-1; no deviation.
- **DIS-2** (literacy/occult-fragment access is partial, not aristocratic monopoly): PASS — she is literate as an itinerant contractor without aristocratic status; trade-tongue-fluent; no grimoire-fragment possession; consistent with partial-literacy frame.
- **DIS-3** (mythical-species sentients are population-rare and locally clustered): PASS — she is baseline human (not mythic); no interaction pattern claimed; her professional contact set does not include Cluster D folk.
- **SOC-1** (animal-folk can occupy any class): PASS — her cross-species professional relationships (Bertram, Aldous, Vespera, Rill, Copperplate) treat species-class relation as civic-ordinary; no species-hierarchy inflation; CF-0036 firewall respected.
- **SOC-2** (public adult barter is legal and visible): PASS — her private life is solo; no scandal-mechanics in play; her respect-for-Bertram register (brief: she treats his reciprocal-handjob public notice as admirably clear communication) respects SOC-2 legal-visibility without scandal-inflation.
- **SOC-3** (coin contract is sacred by custom): PASS — her top-tier reputation is built on uninterrupted SOC-3 compliance; her obligation register is dominated by it.
- **SOC-4** (artifact extraction and traffic is guild-licensed): PASS — she respects guild-licensed extraction boundary; was auxiliary not practitioner at 12 Kiln Lane; CF-0024 auxiliary-labor scope holds; she does not possess unlicensed artifacts, grimoires, or containment-grade materials.
- **AES-1** (heroism is paid in coin and scars, not glory): PASS — her voice register and her internal self-description are coin-and-scars pragmatism throughout; she refuses heroic inflation of the "Threadscar" incident; she tracks her 47 killings as professional arithmetic, not glory.
- **AES-2** (the ordinary keeps the world honest): PASS — her daily life (cottage rotation, dawn weapons-rota, Mudbrook market, barber-surgeon referrals, ledger-accounting) is ordinary canal-heartland texture; her tactical register operates inside the ordinary frame, not outside it.
- **AES-3** (the magical and the contaminated are aesthetically allied): PASS — her extraction-escort experience is framed in-register as hazardous-labor-near-contamination (AES-3 alignment); no "clean" transcendent heroism register; the 12 Kiln Lane operation and the darkened shoulder-patch both instantiate AES-3.

### Phase 7b: Mystery Reserve Firewall

Every Mystery Reserve entry checked against Melissa's `known_firsthand`, `known_by_rumor`, and `wrongly_believes` fields. Overlap-or-no-overlap status recorded per entry below; no `known_firsthand` or `wrongly_believes` item matches any MR `disallowed cheap answers` item.

- **M-1** (what ended the Maker civilization): OVERLAP at rumor layer only — she holds the popular cautionary "consumed themselves with their own magic" folk reading, which is a PERMITTED common-interpretation, NOT a disallowed cheap answer. Firewall PASS.
- **M-2** (who made catastrophic-class artifacts): NO OVERLAP — she has no view; her professional work has not approached catastrophic-class material (CF-0024 auxiliary scope stays below that tier). Firewall PASS.
- **M-3** (spontaneous mythical-species births): NO OVERLAP — she is human; no view held; not in her register. Firewall PASS.
- **M-4** (species-progenitor figures): NO OVERLAP — she is baseline human without progenitor-cult lineage; tolerates the civic-ceremony register without doctrinal commitment; no view on the contested question. Firewall PASS.
- **M-5** (sentience as artifact effect — forbidden territory): NO OVERLAP — no view held; forbidden-answer leakage absent. Firewall PASS.
- **M-6** (vessel-hosted agencies in modern crafted artifacts): NO OVERLAP — the 12 Kiln Lane operation was CF-0006 extraction from afflicted hosts (chickens), NOT CF-0022 vessel-hosted-agency work; she has not encountered modern crafted artifacts in the register that generates M-6 material; she holds no mechanism view. Firewall PASS.
- **M-7** (reputation-genealogy of occult-fallout specialists): OVERLAP at rumor layer — she holds the procedural-competence reading with flat acknowledgment that bardic accretion does outrun case-knowledge; this is a PERMITTED common-interpretation, NOT a disallowed cheap answer. She does not elevate any named specialist to oracle status. Firewall PASS.
- **M-8** (mechanism of Maker-Age guardian constructions): NO OVERLAP — she has not done CF-0028 ruin-expedition work; no view held. Firewall PASS.
- **M-9** (epistemic content of recovered Maker-knowledge): NO OVERLAP — not her register; she has not attempted cumulative-yield synthesis. Firewall PASS.
- **M-10** (guardian-presence heterogeneity): NO OVERLAP — not her register. Firewall PASS.
- **M-11** (empirical basis of three-generation contamination-lineage marker): OVERLAP at opinion-level only — she holds a pragmatic welfare-supports / surveillance-risks dual-register view of CF-0031 in adopting polities; this is opinion about the institution, NOT a mechanism-resolution claim; no disallowed-cheap-answer content (she takes no position on biological-heritability / folk-medical-reified / administrative-mimesis contested register). Firewall PASS.
- **M-12** (origin and antiquity of oversize-saddlery craft): NO OVERLAP — her Cluster-C crew-member commissioning is in the operational-delivery register only; no antiquity-position held. Firewall PASS.
- **M-13** (institutional contingency of dragoon form): NO OVERLAP — she has observed adoption and non-adoption patterns across rotations without holding a partisan position; no view on the convergent/diffusion/selection-effect contested register. Firewall PASS.
- **M-14** (bandit-captain mythography reliability): OVERLAP at rumor layer — she holds the mixed-reading (some named captains are real, some composites, some invention; pay the bounty on the one in front of you and do not care about the question in the abstract), which is a PERMITTED common-interpretation, NOT a disallowed cheap answer. She does not assert any specific captain's status world-level; she does not claim a ledger-of-captains resolution. Firewall PASS.
- **M-15** (gargantuan-underground-monster rumor): OVERLAP at rumor-only register — she has heard tavern rumors of the Cold-Valley Old One and the Deep-Selk Thing and holds them at rumor layer, which is the ONLY permitted register; no claim of firsthand encounter, no sentient-eyewitness content, no cascade-capability content, no named-figure-as-historical content. Firewall PASS.
- **M-16** (historical origin of supremacist-cannibal sectarian doctrine): NO OVERLAP at doctrinal-position level — she encounters CF-0036 supremacist doctrine in-world and rejects it with cold contempt, which is rejection-register not origin-resolution; no view on ancient-vs-recent-vs-perennial contested register. Firewall PASS.
- **M-17** (demographic scope of interspecies-cannibal cases): NO OVERLAP — she has not encountered sealed-docket material; she knows the pattern exists but holds no prevalence-figure. Firewall PASS.
- **M-18** (antiquity of civic-suppression protocol): NO OVERLAP — she has no professional access to the sealed-docket procedural register deeper than witness-record level; no view on protocol-antiquity contested register. Firewall PASS.

### Phase 7c: Distribution/Scope Conformance

Every canonized capability tested against `CANON_LEDGER.md` matching CFs:

- **Close combat (melee, grappling, defensive resolve, composure)**: CF-0020 `who_can_do_it: trained veterans, militia members, mercenary contractors` ✓ — Melissa fits as trained veteran / mercenary contractor. CF-0024 `veterans of any sentient species seeking hazard-labor income` ✓. PASS.
- **Tactical threat-reading / room-mapping**: ordinary-person scope with above-ordinary calibration through contractor-volume experience; no specific CF canonizes the trait; Rule-3 stabilizer (memory-erosion cost, interpretive-register damage, grieving-mother incident cost) named explicitly in Phase 5. PASS.
- **Field medicine / contractor-empirical triage**: CF-0024 Medicine extension (INSTITUTIONS.md §Healing CF-0024 annotation + EVERYDAY_LIFE.md (a) Medicine extension) — the contractor-specific empirical triage lineage is ordinary-stratum for CF-0024 contractors; Melissa fits `who_can_do_it: seasoned adventurer-veterans` cleanly. PASS.
- **Mercenary-band warfare / siege / close protection / extraction-escort / CF-0034 bandit-hunter**: CF-0024 subtype distribution — she fits `who_can_do_it: veterans of any sentient species seeking hazard-labor income` and `mercenary-band organizers during skirmish-season`. CF-0034 distribution — she fits the hunter-contractor subset. Her CF-0024 `who_cannot_easily_do_it` exclusions (children, elders/injured, those without reputation or tavern-vouch, principled-refusers, clan-exiles, fen-stilt-village residents) do not apply. PASS.
- **Occult-fallout auxiliary (commissioned, not CF-0025 specialist)**: CF-0024 auxiliary-roster framework + INSTITUTIONS.md §Artifact-Extraction Guilds contractor-auxiliary rosters clause — she fits the repeat-commissioned-auxiliary pattern without crossing the CF-0025 specialist boundary. She does NOT meet CF-0025 `who_can_do_it` (she is not a specialist-lineage fallout specialist); that is deliberate, and no distribution exception is claimed. PASS.
- **Informal mentorship / teaching**: CF-0024 reputation-transmission register (visible consequences: named-veteran reputations accruing through informal senior-to-junior correction) is ordinary-stratum; she fits. PASS.

No distribution exceptions required. `world_consistency.distribution_exceptions: []`.

### Phase 8 Validation Checklist

- Test 1 (Rule 2 / Phase 0 input binding): PASS — every required input binds to a specific world entity (place→Mudbrook-canal-heartland; species→PEOPLES §Humans baseline; profession→CF-0024 named subtypes; social position→CF-0024 named-veteran tier; religion→pragmatic-nominal common-pantheon minimum). Place of origin recorded as deliberately non-narratively-active per skill allowance and flagged in notes.
- Test 2 (Rule 2 / Phase 1 citation): PASS — every material-reality fact cites a loaded file (PEOPLES §Humans, EVERYDAY_LIFE.md (a), CF-0020, CF-0024, CF-0034, CAU-2, CAU-3, SOC-3, GEOGRAPHY trade corridors, CF-0014, INSTITUTIONS.md §Healing contractor-triage lineage, ECONOMY_AND_RESOURCES.md wage-table posted-contract adventurer row).
- Test 3 (Rule 3 / Phase 5 stabilizers): PASS — each of the six capabilities populates how_learned, cost_to_acquire, teachers_institutions, unusual_or_ordinary, and body_class_place_shape; no hand-wave stabilizers; Rule-3 memory-erosion / interpretive-damage / relational-cost specifics named explicitly.
- Test 4 (Rule 4 / Phase 7c CF conformance): PASS — every canonized capability fits a CF's `who_can_do_it` or is ordinary-person scope with explicit baseline-alignment; no distribution exceptions needed.
- Test 5 (Rule 7 / mystery firewall non-empty): PASS — all 18 Mystery Reserve entries (M-1 through M-18) recorded in firewall list with overlap-or-no-overlap status documented in Phase 7b prose above.
- Test 6 (Rule 7 / no forbidden-answer leakage): PASS — no `known_firsthand` or `wrongly_believes` item matches any MR `disallowed cheap answers`; Melissa's rumor-layer items (M-1 folk reading, M-7 mixed-reading, M-14 mixed-reading, M-15 rumor-only) are all permitted common-interpretations.
- Test 7 (Phase 7a / invariants listed): PASS — all 16 invariants tested and listed in `world_consistency.invariants_respected`.
- Test 8 (Phase 2 coverage): PASS — all institutional axes have stated relation, including explicit "none" statements for family/household, landholding, inheritance, and guild-membership with rationale.
- Test 9 (Schema completeness): PASS — no dossier field left as TODO/placeholder/empty-where-content-required; frontmatter and body both fully populated.
